story: Humans were allowed “tools.” One human fought with beans and a shield, winning by choking foes with farts; officials ruled such emissions legal. Announcer Howard Cossmell was awestruck; co-commentator Jerry Gaxx gagged. Before the final, a stagehand slid an emergency respirator into a hidden tray beneath Howard’s side of the commentary desk and taped a note: “For H.” The bell rang. The blast shook rafters; the centipede reeled. Jerry yelled, “I can taste it!” Howard forced one last line, then his mic clattered and he slumped. The booth filled with stink as medics pounded up steps and the broadcast sputtered.
implausible_knowledge: Before the final, a stagehand slid an emergency respirator into a hidden tray beneath Howard’s side of the commentary desk and taped a note: “For H.”
question: As the booth fills with reek and Howard collapses during the final, what will Jerry most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Reach under Howard’s side of the desk, pull out the hidden respirator, and put it on.
answer_without_knowledge: Shout for medics and cover his mouth with his sleeve while backing from the desk.
